title: Strella's Cafe
description: Cobblemon/Create focused modpack, engineering meets monster catching!
body:
A Cobblemon/Create focused modpack, including lots of side activities to have fun with. Catch pokemon with Cobblemon and many of it's addons, take pictues of them or the beautiful landscape of minecraft, or even your own creations using "Exposure".

With create, make contraptions and automate your world with steampunk factories, trains, and even planes.

For the more laid back life, enjoy the let's do series and many of its addons, decorate your house with new furnishings, plant and tend to your crops and maybe make some tea ^^.
